name: Stuffed Lobster Tails
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lobsters on a cutting board and crack open the shells.
2. Remove the lobster meat and set aside.
3. In a bowl, mix the diced water chestnuts (or celery) with cooking oil until well combined.
4. Stuff the lobster shells generously with the mixture.
5. Replace the shells and serve hot.
